tasks.title: Stream file uploads to disk instead of reading into memory
tasks.description: routes_upload.py reads entire file content into memory before size validation. Use aiofiles chunked writes and reject mid-stream when threshold crossed.

tasks.title: Update job_pages status to failed when _save_one throws
tasks.description: _save_one in batch_processor.py increments error_count but leaves the job_pages row as 'done'. Pass page_index into save failure path and call _set_page_status(..., 'failed').

tasks.title: Add Alembic and remove migration-on-boot
tasks.description: init_db() runs raw ALTER TABLE at every startup, causing race conditions on multi-instance deploy. Add Alembic, move migrations to deploy pipeline step before app start.

tasks.title: Raise max_output_tokens from 8192 to 16384
tasks.description: Invoices with many line items can exceed 8192 output tokens, producing malformed JSON that fails all retries. Gemini 1.5 Flash supports 16384.

tasks.title: Propagate quantity_unit and weight_kg through extraction pipeline
tasks.description: Prompt asks Gemini for quantity_unit and weight_kg per line item but GeminiLineItem and LineItem models don't have these fields. Add fields to models, ORM, and extractor.normalize.

tasks.title: Add post-extraction sanity check for hallucinated zeros
tasks.description: Add _sanity_check step after normalize: flag ZERO_ASSESSABLE_WITH_ITEMS when line items are non-zero but assessable_value is 0, and ZERO_GRAND_TOTAL when grand_total is 0 but items exist.

tasks.title: Add indexes on invoices.job_id and line_items.invoice_id
tasks.description: Both FK columns lack index=True. Full table scans on every Excel build and Extractions page load. Add index=True to InvoiceORM.job_id and LineItemORM.invoice_id.

tasks.title: Migrate invoice_date from String(20) to Date column
tasks.description: invoice_date stored as DD/MM/YYYY string prevents SQL date range queries. Change to Column(Date, nullable=True), update extractor.normalize to emit Python date, update excel_builder formatting.

tasks.title: Wire gemini_quota cleanup into file_cleaner scheduler
tasks.description: quota_manager.cleanup_old_windows exists but is never called. Add it to file_cleaner.py's APScheduler to run hourly alongside existing file deletion job.

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded API_BASE with VITE_API_URL env var
tasks.description: API_BASE is hardcoded to production URL in utils/formatters.js. Use import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL with fallback. Add .env.local for dev and Vercel env var for production.

tasks.title: Replace JWT in SSE URL query param with short-lived stream token
tasks.description: JWT passed as ?token= appears in server logs and browser history. Add POST /stream-token endpoint returning a 60s single-use ticket; SSE connects with ticket token instead of full JWT.

tasks.title: Add SSE reconnection logic on error
tasks.description: es.onerror does nothing. On SSE disconnect close EventSource, wait 2-5s, and reconnect. Backend stream endpoint already handles reconnects to completed jobs gracefully.

tasks.title: Wire invoice correction edit UI in Detail page
tasks.description: PATCH /review/correct endpoint exists but Detail.jsx has no edit toggle or form. Add edit mode that converts fields to inputs and calls the correction endpoint on save.

tasks.title: Return signed URL for Excel download instead of proxying file
tasks.description: routes_download.py fetches Excel from Supabase into backend memory then streams to client. Generate a Supabase signed URL (300s) and return 302 RedirectResponse instead.

tasks.title: Restrict /review/correct to explicit allowed fields only
tasks.description: corrected_fields: Dict[str, Any] allows overwriting any ORM column. Define InvoiceCorrectionFields model with only user-editable fields and apply only those to the ORM object.

tasks.title: Handle expired source files in retry endpoint
tasks.description: Files are deleted after 2 hours but retry button stays active. Either extend TTL to 24h or pre-check that all failed pages have source files before starting retry and return a clear error.

tasks.title: Add database probe to health check endpoint
tasks.description: GET /health returns 200 unconditionally even when DB is down. Execute SELECT 1 in the health handler and return HTTP 503 if it fails so Render marks the instance unhealthy.

tasks.title: Add magic byte validation to file upload
tasks.description: Upload validation checks extension only. After reading first bytes, verify magic bytes match declared extension (%PDF, JPEG, PNG). Reject mismatches before writing to disk.

tasks.title: Add rate limiting to auth endpoints
tasks.description: No rate limiting on /auth/login or /auth/signup enables brute-force and email enumeration. Add slowapi with 10/minute on login and 5/minute on signup.

tasks.title: Split database.py into engine, models, and migrations modules
tasks.description: database.py has 267 lines mixing engine setup, ORM models, init_db, and db_retry. Split into db/engine.py, db/models.py, db/migrations.py with no behavior change.

tasks.title: Remove dead BATCH_SIZE and BATCH_DELAY_SECONDS config
tasks.description: config.py defines BATCH_SIZE=10 and BATCH_DELAY_SECONDS=65 but neither is referenced anywhere. Remove or wire them up to avoid false confidence in batching behavior.

tasks.title: Replace threading.Lock with asyncio.Lock in job_store
tasks.description: job_store.py uses threading.Lock around async data structures. All callers are async. Replace with asyncio.Lock to match the event loop model.

tasks.title: Increase Files API polling interval from 2s to 5s
tasks.description: gemini_client._upload_file polls ACTIVE state with time.sleep(2) every 2s in thread pool. Change to time.sleep(5) and max_wait_sec=120 to reduce thread churn by 60%.

tasks.title: Update default Gemini model to gemini-2.0-flash
tasks.description: config.py defaults GEMINI_MODEL to gemini-1.5-flash. Update default to gemini-2.0-flash (or 2.5-flash) for better structured extraction accuracy.

tasks.title: Change flags column from semicolon string to PostgreSQL ARRAY
tasks.description: flags stored as semicolon-delimited text prevents indexed filtering. Change to ARRAY(Text) type to enable clean flag-based queries.

tasks.title: Make JobORM.user_id non-nullable
tasks.description: user_id is nullable=True in database.py. After backfilling or removing orphaned rows, add NOT NULL constraint via Alembic migration.

tasks.title: Refresh user object from /auth/me on AuthContext mount
tasks.description: User object read from localStorage is never refreshed. Add /auth/me fetch in AuthContext useEffect on mount (guarded by token presence) to replace stale cached object.

tasks.title: Add per-file upload progress using XMLHttpRequest
tasks.description: Upload.jsx uses fetch with no progress events, leaving users with no feedback during long uploads. Replace with XHR and wire xhr.upload.onprogress to bytes-transferred state.

tasks.title: Consolidate all job-scoped endpoints under /jobs/{job_id}
tasks.description: URL structure is inconsistent: /status, /stream, /download, /review are top-level while /jobs/{id}/invoices is nested. Move all job-scoped routes under /jobs/{job_id}/.

tasks.title: Add pagination to /jobs and invoice listing endpoints
tasks.description: list_jobs has hardcoded .limit(50) and list_job_invoices has no limit. Add ?page and ?per_page query params to both endpoints.

tasks.title: Add POST /jobs/{job_id}/rebuild-excel endpoint
tasks.description: Excel build failure leaves job in error state with invoice data intact but unreachable. Add rebuild-excel endpoint that reruns only the Excel build and Storage upload step.

tasks.title: Switch to structured JSON logging with job_id context
tasks.description: Logs are unstructured text making per-job filtering impossible. Switch to python-json-logger and use LoggerAdapter in batch_processor to inject job_id into every log line.

tasks.title: Use EmailStr for email validation in signup
tasks.description: Naive '@' and '.' check accepts invalid addresses. Use Pydantic's EmailStr field type on SignupRequest.email for proper validation and normalization.

tasks.title: Default ALLOWED_ORIGINS to empty list and fail fast in production
tasks.description: ALLOWED_ORIGINS defaults to localhost values if unset in production env. Default to [] and add startup check that fails if ALLOWED_ORIGINS is empty when ENV != 'development'.
